2025-December.name: December 2025
2025-December.description: Current season - fresh slate for this weekend

players.commander: Starscream, Power Hungry // Starscream, Seeker Leader

games.notes: Lots of flying and then not flying and then flying.
Epic comeback. Also, Anson was here.
Experience counters? More like.. we all lost the game

players.commander: Starscream, Power Hungry // Starscream, Seeker Leader

games.notes: Authority of consuls is bullshit. Jordan must be stacking the deck.yet despite all odds anson got it

Caleb: "Zada? What does he do?"

Anson: "You guys should kill him."

Nekusar ping + mindcrank from mill deck = the largest graveyards.

Also Parker sacrificed a evolving wilds and forgot to look for a land. We call that a pro gamer move.
SECRET TUNNEL, SECRET TUNNEL! Through the mountain! Secret secret secret secret tunnel!
Zuko turned to the dark side again and became the archnemesis.. and won.
Somehow on the last turn 6 life ended up as enough to commit murders
Anson broke his treaty MULTIPLE times and has proven he can't be trusted
I think we got a clue what a treasure this deck is. Because we died to ping damage from treasures and clues
Levi misplayed and we all died
"Danny pulled it off for me" - Anson
When the cats are away, two players make a deal for who will win
Turns out two toughness-matters decks make the game go very long.

Levi: "How much floating mana do I have left?"
Parker: "I think 15"
Jordan: "Who do you want to get 2nd?"
Jordan almost reverse-killed Levi when he thought Levi could kill Anson and then re-un-reverse killed him.
